name: kkskills-essentials
description: Generic, project-agnostic working skills (13) that self-improve over time: feedback discipline, clean-architecture & conventional-commits references, proactive task reminders, secret hygiene, concurrency/race-conditions, MCP server authoring, timezone handling, local-LLM selection — plus a meta-skill that folds new learnings back into the right skill (versioned, changelogged, self-contained). Personal/project-specific skills live in kkskills-personal.
